data_sources.state_gdp_per_capita: MoSPI State GDP estimates 2022-23, current prices; West Bengal ranks lower among major states in per-capita GSDP
data_sources.state_informal_economy_share: NSSO PLFS 2022-23, estimated; 0.52 reflects highest informal share among the six states, consistent with West Bengal's large informal sector
data_sources.ruling_party_trust_index: Estimated from Lokniti-CSDS post-2021 West Bengal election survey; TMC government satisfaction, strong Mamata Banerjee factor
data_sources.political_contestation_index: ECI 2021 and 2024 data; 0.65 reflects TMC dominance but BJP emergence as principal opposition since 2019
data_sources.language_network_multiplier: 1.1 reflects strong Bengali-language media ecosystem (ABP Ananda, Zee Bangla, extensive Bengali print including Anandabazar Patrika, Bartaman)
data_sources.media_penetration: BARC India 2023 (tv), IRS 2022 (print: highest print readership ratio among 6 states due to Bengali literary culture), IAMAI-Kantar 2023 (digital: lower due to lower smartphone penetration), RAM Ratings 2022 (radio: relatively higher due to community radio culture)
data_sources.union_legal_framework: Permissive; West Bengal has strong trade union history (CPI(M) era legacy), labour laws favour organized action
data_sources.examination_board: Both West Bengal Board (WBBSE/WBCHSE) and CBSE operate; state board dominant outside Kolkata
